programmes.show_description: How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.
Edge-of-your-seat thriller starring Thomas Gibson. A rogue NSA agent joins an elite group of Native American trackers to stop terrorists crossing the US border. Also starring Louise Lombard (2019).
In the wake of a valuable samurai sword's sale, old rivalries between a British prisoner and a former Japanese POW camp commandant resurface.
The Baron must piece together his life after waking with 24 hours of his memory missing.
Mannering is convinced that his old friend Louisa Trenton has been murdered and must convince the police it wasn't suicide.
Classic western with Randolph Scott and Forrest Tucker. When the notorious Reno Brothers start rampaging through the west, a special agent is sent to bring them to justice (1955).
A quad bike accident leaves a man with serious neck injuries, a builder is injured after falling through the roof of his house, and the team mount a rescue operation for a dog and its owner.

In Munich in 2013 a giant haul of missing masterpieces was discovered. Cornelius Gurlitt was the man behind it and we investigate how his father's job was to purchase works for Hitler. (2014)
Classic western starring Randolph Scott. There's a new marshal in the booming town of Tombstone. But as Wyatt Earp lays down the law, will the city or the cemetery grow the fastest? (1939)

Mannering takes steps to stop the robbery of an antiques collection.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
While searching for a missing crate of valuable antiques, Cordelia discovers the murder and is promptly abducted by the killer.
Whilst captive on a freighter, Mannering and Cordelia uncover a plot to steal an American space capsule. Can they escape the ship and alert the US navy to the crew's nefarious plan?
Western with Jeff Fahey. In Australia's untamed outback, a woman will stop at nothing to save her family's ranch, while two rival suitors will risk everything to win her heart... (1989)

Randall is rooked into advancing half the bounty to a man who promises to lead him to the wanted criminal Shawnee Bill, but Bill may be closer than Randall thinks.
Big John searches for Victoria, who was kidnapped by a foe out for revenge, only to be captured himself .
Victoria and Manolito are upset with their father's dishonest methods while a dying friend of Vaquero arrives with $5,000 to buy the village where he and Vaquero were raised.

Danny and Brett are charged with bringing a former gangster, Frank Rocco, from Italy to America to testify against a large crime syndicate.
Can Steed and Peel prove their innocence when they are implicated in the deaths of foreign agents? Stars Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg.
Steed and Peel try to unravel the mystery of a dead man who repeatedly comes back to life. Will a Research Unit hold the answers to the investigation?
High-octane thriller starring Sam Worthington. An assassin hired to kill a young woman ends up falling for her instead. Together, they team up to avenge her father's death (2017).
